description.en: Contact page for inquiries and collaborations.

title.en: For commissions, collaborations, and editorial conversations.

body.en: I am open to selected inquiries related to creative development, visual direction, archives, and image-based projects.
For new projects, a short note including context, timeline, and scope is helpful. Replies are generally sent within a few business days.
Archive Portfolio presents visual work, research, photographs, and loose sketches as one connected creative practice.
Available for selected collaborations, visual research, concept development, editorial image systems, and portfolio-oriented projects.
